mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user (user_id, user_name, password, email, created_date, modified_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{password}, #{email}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO tb_user_role (user_id, role_id, created_by, created_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{userId}, NOW())
INSERT INTO tb_login_history (user_id, login_ip, login_success, login_fail_reason, login_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{loginIp}, #{loginSuccess}, #{loginFailReason}, NOW())
